description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Emscripten build that triggers on push and pull request events. Define a build job with a matrix strategy that runs on windows-latest, ubuntu-24.04, and macos-14 operating systems, with Debug and Release build types, excluding macOS with Release build type. For each job, check out the code, set up the build environment for the Web platform, configure CMake with the specified build type, and perform the build.
